civilian_explanation: Technical expert/leader role bridging hands-on expertise and management responsibilities.
Human resources office responsible for personnel actions, records, and administrative support at brigade level.
Intelligence office responsible for threat assessment, reporting, and information support at brigade level.
Operations/plans office responsible for coordinating training, schedules, and mission execution at brigade level.
Logistics/supply office responsible for supply, transportation, and sustainment at brigade level.
Human resources office supporting personnel actions and administrative processes at battalion level.
Unit intelligence office supporting threat reporting and situational awareness at battalion level.
Unit operations office coordinating training, schedules, and mission execution at battalion level.
Unit logistics office managing supply and sustainment at battalion level.
Unit communications/IT office responsible for networks, radios, and technical support at battalion level.
In-house IT/communications team responsible for network support, troubleshooting, and service restoration.
Analyst role producing intelligence products and briefings.
Signals intelligence collector/analyst supporting threat detection.
